message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml

participant Application
participant Node
participant Composed_VStack
participant VStack
participant State
participant NodeBuilder
participant "Control.Layer" as ControlLayer
participant Renderer

== 布局树构建过程 ==

Application -> Composed_VStack : build
Composed_VStack -> VStack : buildNode
VStack -> NodeBuilder : setupStateProperties
VStack -> NodeBuilder : setupEnvironmentProperties
VStack -> Node : addNode

alt LayoutRoot
    VStack -> NodeBuilder : loadData
end

== 布局更新构建过程 ==

State <- State : set
State -> Application : invalidateNode
Application -> Application : scheduleUpdate
Application -> Application : update
Application -> Composed_VStack : update
Composed_VStack -> NodeBuilder : updateNode
NodeBuilder -> ControlLayer : invalidate
ControlLayer -> Renderer : invalidate
Application -> Application : update

@enduml
```
